prestazioni: Engine swap to a Daihatsu EB-20DET (0.66L turbocharged inline-3, 64mm bore, 68mm stroke) with forged internals: JE Pistons 8.5:1 compression forged pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft. Pair with a Garrett GT12 turbo (GT1241Z, 0.40 A/R turbine housing) and a custom 38mm external wastegate (Tial MV-R) for 1.2 bar boost targeting 150hp at the wheels.

Full custom 4-1 stainless steel exhaust manifold (304-grade, 1.5mm wall thickness) with a 42mm primary tube diameter, paired with a custom 2.25" straight-pipe exhaust system featuring a HKS Hi-Power Super Sound muffler (part #31006-AK001) and a 100-cell catalytic converter (MagnaFlow 64103) for emissions compliance.

Custom ECU tuning via a Haltech Elite 750 standalone ECU with a 3D-printed intake manifold (PETG material) featuring individual throttle bodies (ITBs) from a Keihin FCR 39mm carburetor setup, adapted with custom billet aluminum mounts. Fuel system upgrade includes a Walbro 255LPH in-tank pump, 600cc/min injectors (ID1000), and a custom fuel rail with AN-6 fittings.
estetica: Full custom widebody conversion using a Rocket Bunny Fellow Max kit (Pandem #PD-DHFLM-01), modified to fit the L-spec chassis with extended steel fenders (1.5mm thickness) and custom carbon fiber overfenders (1.2mm thickness, dry carbon). Rear quarter panels reinforced with seam welding and custom aluminum gussets for rigidity.

Custom front bumper lip and rear diffuser from a 3D-printed ABS prototype, molded into a final carbon fiber piece (2x2 twill weave) with integrated LED fog lights (Morimoto XB LED, 3000K) and a central tow hook (Cusco Type-RS). Rear diffuser includes a Gurney flap and side vents for aerodynamic balance.

OEM+ interior with a full custom roll cage (6-point, TIG-welded 4130 chromoly) from Custom Cages UK, paired with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (fixed-back, FIA-approved) and a custom dashboard overlay in 3mm aluminum (brushed finish) featuring a digital gauge cluster (AEM X-Series 30-0300) and a Momo Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm diameter, suede grip).
